criteria.text: Preview tab renders chords above lyrics in the correct ChordPro style
criteria.test_id: issue-27-c1: chord preview HTML places chords above lyrics (chord cells precede/overlay lyric cells)

criteria.text: Directives ({title}, {comment}, {start_of_chorus}, etc.) render as section headers / labels
criteria.test_id: issue-27-c2: chord preview HTML renders directives as labelled elements

criteria.text: Stamping still uses lyric-only text (stamp log and .als clip names unchanged)
criteria.test_id: issue-27-c3: stamp path (server parseChordPro) still emits chord-bracketed lyric text unchanged by the preview feature

criteria.text: ChordPro text with no chords still renders correctly (pure lyric sheet)
criteria.test_id: issue-27-c4: chord preview HTML renders pure-lyric ChordPro (no chords) without error and shows the lyrics

criteria.text: Preview tab visibly shows chords above lyrics in the live app (rendered DOM)
criteria.test_id: #27 — ChordPro preview renders chords above lyrics in the DOM
